summary: TTS | Navigation options in the top left when no follow team is set
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is on the Following Teams page

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to the Arizona Diamondbacks
steps.result: THEN the app should say 'The [focused_team] is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your follow team. Move right, or down to hear additional teams to follow. Move left to highlight the “Cancel” button.'
